narrative:
Norwood 4-C (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,075 registered voters, with 63.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.9%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.5 percentage points.
